channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cannabis leaves identified as potential source of medical compounds
item.description: A research team has discovered several previously unidentified compounds in cannabis leaves, including a new substance.

item.title: Study clarifies fat metabolism
item.description: Researchers have identified a protein related to fat metabolism, potentially advancing scientific understanding.

item.title: Study Links Water Intake to Reduced Kidney Stone Risk
item.description: Researchers investigated whether increased water consumption may help prevent kidney stone recurrence.

item.title: Research Examines Formation of the Twelve Apostles
item.description: Geological study links Australia’s Twelve Apostles to tectonic shifts and seabed elevation.
